what_changed: Recovered backend execution environment at C:\venvs_hub\portfolio_tracker_dev and completed dependency bootstrap.
Ran control-tower gates (contracts, skill registry strict, compileall) and all passed.
Fixed backend summary endpoint runtime error by normalizing latest numeric extraction in portfolio_service.
Installed frontend dependencies and verified Next.js dev server startup on localhost:3000.
Published canonical kickoff artifacts: orchestration/task.json and orchestration/results/kickoff_baseline.result.json.

risks.description: Frontend dependency set includes deprecated packages and a Next.js 14.1.0 security advisory warning.
Local harness may require pinned interpreter path for project Python commands in some sessions.

next_3_actions: Issue Phase 2 frontend ticket to wire dashboard to /api/portfolio/summary, /api/macro-vitals, and /api/stress-test.
Issue transaction form ticket for POST /api/transactions with validation and API error handling.
Update integration_status.md with kickoff baseline completion and dependency-risk tracking.
